curiosityQuestion: Have you ever wondered how Typed Functions works under the hood in TypeScript?
whyExists: Typed Functions is a core building block in TypeScript. It solves fundamental structural and data manipulation problems that arise when building scalable applications.
realWorldAnalogy: Think of Typed Functions like a well-designed component in an everyday physical system — organizing, transforming, and routing data efficiently.
simpleExplanation: At its foundation, Typed Functions provides a clear, standardized way to execute logic in TypeScript. This section explains every detail step by step from absolute zero.
